heading: Nasopharyngeal radium irradiation
label: 1720E Nasopharyngeal radium irradiation
notes: Amendments2021—Subsec. (a). substituted “air, or space service” for “or air service”.Pub. L. 116–283
amendments: Amendments2021—Subsec. (a). substituted “air, or space service” for “or air service”.Pub. L. 116–283

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary may provide any veteran a medical examination, and hospital care, medical services, and nursing home care, which the Secretary determines is needed for the treatment of any cancer of the head or neck which the Secretary finds may be associated with the veteran’s receipt of nasopharyngeal radium irradiation treatments in active military, naval, air, or space service.
served as an aviator in the active military, naval, or air service before the end of the Korean conflict; or
underwent submarine training in active naval service before .January 1, 1965
